name: erxes-next-plugin
description: Confidential OAuth plugin for operating erxes Next data through GraphQL with strict anti-hallucination rules.

requiredEnv.label: erxes gateway URL
requiredEnv.description: Gateway URL, for example https://your-subdomain.next.erxes.io/gateway or http://localhost:4000

requiredEnv.label: OAuth confidential client ID
requiredEnv.description: Client ID from erxes Settings > OAuth Clients

requiredEnv.label: OAuth confidential client secret
requiredEnv.description: Secret shown once when creating a confidential OAuth client

erxesBaseUrl.description: erxes gateway URL, for example https://your-subdomain.next.erxes.io/gateway or http://localhost:4000

clientId.description: Confidential OAuth client ID from erxes Settings > OAuth Clients

clientSecret.description: Confidential OAuth client secret shown once when creating the client
